title: Furnace Installation
metaTitle: Furnace Installation GTA | Queensway Heating & Air Conditioning
metaDescription: New high-efficiency furnace installation across the GTA. Same-day quotes. Licensed HVAC technicians. Financing and Greener Homes rebates available.
blurb: New high-efficiency gas furnace installed right the first time — with a warranty you can count on.
heroHeading: Expert Furnace Installation in the GTA
heroSub: Upgrade to a high-efficiency gas furnace and save on your energy bills. Lennox, Carrier, and Trane certified.
body: Whether your old furnace has reached the end of its lifespan or you're building new, our licensed HVAC technicians will help you choose and install the right furnace for your home and budget. We carry Lennox, Carrier, and Trane units with AFUE ratings up to 98%.
benefits: Free in-home assessment and transparent quote
Eligible for Enbridge and Greener Homes rebates

faqs.q: How long does a furnace installation take?
faqs.a: Most residential furnace installations are completed in 4–6 hours. Our team handles permit applications and gas line connections.

faqs.q: What furnace brands do you install?
faqs.a: We install and service Lennox, Carrier, Trane, Goodman, and other leading brands. We'll help you choose the best fit for your budget and home size.

faqs.q: Are there rebates available for a new furnace in Ontario?
faqs.a: Yes — the Canada Greener Homes Grant and Enbridge Home Efficiency Rebate both offer rebates for qualifying high-efficiency furnaces. We help you with the paperwork.

title: Furnace Repair
metaTitle: Furnace Repair GTA — 24/7 Emergency Service | Queensway Heating & Air
metaDescription: Fast, same-day furnace repair across the GTA. 24/7 emergency service. Licensed gas technicians. Call Queensway Heating & Air Conditioning.
blurb: Fast furnace repair when you need it most — 24/7 emergency response across the GTA.
heroHeading: Furnace Repair in the GTA — Same Day
heroSub: No heat? Don't wait. Our licensed technicians diagnose and repair all furnace makes and models, often same day.
body: A broken furnace in a Canadian winter is an emergency. Queensway's technicians carry an extensive parts inventory so most repairs are completed on the first visit. We service all brands including Lennox, Carrier, Trane, Goodman, Bryant, and more.
benefits: 90-day parts and labour warranty on repairs

faqs.q: How quickly can you come for an emergency furnace repair?
faqs.a: We offer same-day emergency service 7 days a week. Call us and we'll do our best to have a technician at your door within hours.

faqs.q: Is it worth repairing an old furnace?
faqs.a: If your furnace is under 15 years old and the repair cost is less than half the cost of a new unit, repair is usually the right call. We'll give you an honest assessment.

title: Air Conditioner Installation
metaTitle: Air Conditioner Installation GTA | Queensway Heating & Air
metaDescription: New central air conditioner installation across the GTA. High-efficiency units. Financing available. Call Queensway for a free quote.
blurb: Cool your home efficiently with a new central air conditioner — installed and guaranteed.
heroHeading: Air Conditioner Installation in the GTA
heroSub: Beat the Ontario summer heat with a new high-SEER air conditioner. Free quotes, same-week installation.
body: A properly sized and installed air conditioner makes all the difference in Ontario summers. Our certified HVAC technicians will assess your home, recommend the right unit, and install it to manufacturer specifications — maximizing efficiency and comfort.
benefits: Free in-home assessment and load calculation
Eligible for Enbridge home efficiency rebates

faqs.q: What size air conditioner do I need?
faqs.a: Sizing depends on your home's square footage, insulation, windows, and layout. We perform a proper Manual J load calculation — not a rough guess — to ensure you get the right unit.

faqs.q: How long does a central AC installation take?
faqs.a: Most installations are completed in 4–6 hours. We handle everything from the refrigerant lines and electrical disconnect to the indoor evaporator coil.

title: Air Conditioner Repair
metaTitle: Air Conditioner Repair GTA — Same Day | Queensway Heating & Air
metaDescription: Fast air conditioner repair across the GTA. Same-day appointments. All brands serviced. Licensed HVAC technicians. Call Queensway 24/7.
blurb: AC not cooling? We diagnose and fix all brands — same-day appointments available.
heroHeading: Air Conditioner Repair in the GTA
heroSub: Warm air, strange noises, or a frozen unit? Our technicians carry the parts to fix most AC problems on the first visit.
body: From refrigerant leaks and faulty capacitors to compressor failures and frozen evaporator coils, Queensway's licensed HVAC technicians diagnose and repair all central air conditioning makes and models, fast.
benefits: All brands — Lennox, Carrier, Trane, Goodman, Rheem

faqs.q: Why is my AC running but not cooling?
faqs.a: The most common causes are low refrigerant, a dirty air filter, a faulty capacitor, or a failing compressor. Call us for a same-day diagnosis.

faqs.q: How much does air conditioner repair cost in the GTA?
faqs.a: Most AC repairs range from $150–$600 depending on the fault. We provide a firm quote before any work begins — no surprises.

title: Heat Pump Installation
metaTitle: Heat Pump Installation GTA | Queensway Heating & Air Conditioning
metaDescription: Air-source heat pump installation across the GTA. Up to $10,600 in Greener Homes rebates available. Lennox, Mitsubishi, Bosch certified. Call today.
blurb: Heating and cooling in one efficient system — and up to $10,600 in government rebates available.
heroHeading: Heat Pump Installation in the GTA
heroSub: Qualify for up to $10,600 in Ontario and federal rebates on an air-source heat pump. We handle all the paperwork.
body: Air-source heat pumps are the most efficient way to heat and cool your home — they can deliver 2–3x the energy value of electric baseboard heating. Combined with Ontario's Greener Homes Grant and Enbridge HER+ rebates, the economics have never been better.
benefits: Heat and cool with one system
Up to $10,600 in combined rebates available
Cold-climate rated units for Ontario winters
Reduces carbon footprint vs. gas furnace
Lennox, Mitsubishi, Bosch, and Carrier certified

faqs.q: Do heat pumps work in Canadian winters?
faqs.a: Modern cold-climate heat pumps (like the Lennox XC21 or Mitsubishi Hyper Heat) work down to -30°C. Most Ontario homeowners pair them with a gas furnace backup for the coldest days.

faqs.q: What rebates are available for heat pumps in Ontario?
faqs.a: The Canada Greener Homes Grant offers up to $5,000, and the Enbridge HER+ program adds up to $5,600 for qualifying homeowners — combined up to $10,600. We help you apply.

title: Ductless Air Conditioning
metaTitle: Ductless AC Installation GTA | Mini-Split Systems | Queensway Heating & Air
metaDescription: Ductless mini-split AC installation and repair across the GTA. Perfect for home additions, older homes, and zones without ductwork. Free quotes.
blurb: Cool any room without ductwork — efficient, quiet, and flexible mini-split systems installed by our certified team.
heroHeading: Ductless Mini-Split AC Installation in the GTA
heroSub: No ductwork? No problem. Ductless systems heat and cool individual rooms with exceptional efficiency.
body: Ductless mini-split systems are the ideal solution for home additions, finished basements, older homes without ductwork, or any space where extending central HVAC isn't practical. They're quiet, energy-efficient, and can provide both heating and cooling from a single unit. We install and service Mitsubishi, Fujitsu, Daikin, LG, and other leading ductless brands.
benefits: No ductwork required — faster, cleaner installation
Heats and cools individual zones independently
Up to 30% more efficient than window AC units
Ideal for additions, garages, condos, and older homes
Mitsubishi, Fujitsu, Daikin, and LG certified

faqs.q: What's the difference between a ductless and a central AC system?
faqs.a: Central AC uses a network of ducts to distribute conditioned air throughout your home. A ductless (mini-split) system delivers air directly into one or more rooms via wall-mounted indoor units — no ducts needed. It's ideal when adding ductwork isn't practical.

faqs.q: Can a ductless system heat as well as cool?
faqs.a: Yes — most ductless mini-splits are heat pumps, meaning they provide efficient heating in winter and cooling in summer from the same unit. Some cold-climate models work down to -25°C.

title: Water Heater
metaTitle: Water Heater Installation & Repair GTA | Queensway Heating & Air
metaDescription: Tank and tankless water heater installation and repair across the GTA. Same-day service available. Bradford White, Navien, Noritz certified. Free quotes.
blurb: Tank and tankless water heaters — installed, repaired, and maintained by licensed gas technicians.
heroHeading: Water Heater Installation in the GTA
heroSub: No hot water? Need to upgrade to tankless? Queensway's gas technicians handle all water heater installations and repairs.
body: From standard 40–60 gallon tank units to on-demand tankless systems, Queensway installs and services all types of residential water heaters. We're certified on Bradford White, Navien, Noritz, Rinnai, and other leading brands.

faqs.q: Should I get a tank or tankless water heater?
faqs.a: Tankless provides endless hot water and uses less energy but costs more upfront. Tank units are lower cost. We'll help you compare based on your household size and usage.

faqs.q: How long do water heaters last?
faqs.a: Tank heaters typically last 8–12 years. Tankless units last 15–20+ years. If yours is over 10 years old and starting to fail, replacement is usually more cost-effective than repair.

title: Fireplace Installation & Service
metaTitle: Gas Fireplace Installation & Repair GTA | Queensway Heating & Air
metaDescription: Gas fireplace installation, repair, and annual service across the GTA. Licensed gas technicians. All major brands. Call Queensway for a free quote.
blurb: Gas fireplace installation and service by licensed gas technicians — cozy comfort, done safely.
heroHeading: Gas Fireplace Installation in the GTA
heroSub: Add warmth and ambiance to any room with a gas fireplace. Our licensed technicians handle everything from selection to installation.
body: A gas fireplace is one of the most popular home upgrades in Ontario — combining comfort, ambiance, and supplemental heating. Queensway's licensed gas fitters install and service direct-vent, top-vent, and B-vent gas fireplaces from leading brands. We also perform annual WETT-recognized gas fireplace inspections and cleaning.
benefits: Licensed gas fitters for safe, code-compliant installation
All major brands: Napoleon, Valor, Regency, Majestic
Annual gas fireplace service and cleaning

faqs.q: Do I need a chimney for a gas fireplace?
faqs.a: No — most modern gas fireplaces are direct-vent units that use a co-axial pipe to bring in combustion air and exhaust gases through an exterior wall. No traditional chimney is required.

faqs.q: How often should a gas fireplace be serviced?
faqs.a: Annually is recommended. A service call includes burner cleaning, thermocouple testing, gas pressure check, glass cleaning, and a safety inspection — important for both performance and safety.

title: HRV & ERV Installation
metaTitle: HRV & ERV Installation GTA | Queensway Heating & Air Conditioning
metaDescription: Heat Recovery Ventilator (HRV) and Energy Recovery Ventilator (ERV) installation and service across the GTA. Improve indoor air quality. Call Queensway.
blurb: Fresh, filtered air year-round — HRV and ERV systems that improve comfort and indoor air quality.
heroHeading: HRV & ERV Installation in the GTA
heroSub: Breathe better at home. A Heat Recovery Ventilator brings in fresh air while retaining heat — no wasted energy.
body: Modern homes are built tight for energy efficiency, but that means stale air, moisture, and indoor pollutants can build up. A Heat Recovery Ventilator (HRV) or Energy Recovery Ventilator (ERV) continuously exchanges stale indoor air for fresh outdoor air — while recovering up to 80% of the heat energy. Queensway installs and services Lifebreath, Venmar, Daikin, and other leading HRV/ERV brands.
benefits: Continuous fresh air without wasting heat
Reduces indoor humidity, allergens, and VOCs
Required in most new Ontario home builds (Building Code)

faqs.q: What's the difference between an HRV and an ERV?
faqs.a: An HRV (Heat Recovery Ventilator) transfers heat between incoming and outgoing air, ideal for heating climates like Ontario. An ERV (Energy Recovery Ventilator) also transfers moisture, which helps maintain indoor humidity during dry winters. We'll recommend the right unit for your home.

faqs.q: Do I need an HRV in my home?
faqs.a: Ontario Building Code requires HRVs in all new homes built since 2017. If your home is well-sealed and you notice stale air, condensation on windows, or high humidity, adding an HRV can significantly improve your indoor air quality and comfort.

title: Maintenance Plans
metaTitle: HVAC Maintenance Plans GTA | Queensway Heating & Air Conditioning
metaDescription: Annual HVAC maintenance plans in the GTA. Furnace and AC tune-ups, priority service, and savings for plan members. Protect your investment.
blurb: Annual tune-ups plus priority service and member savings — protect your HVAC investment.
heroHeading: HVAC Maintenance Plans in the GTA
heroSub: One membership covers your annual furnace and AC tune-up — plus priority emergency booking and exclusive member discounts.
body: Queensway's maintenance plan keeps your heating and cooling equipment running at peak efficiency year-round. Members get two tune-ups per year (furnace in fall, AC in spring), priority scheduling, and a 15% discount on repairs.
benefits: Reminder calls — no need to remember
Transferable if you sell your home

faqs.q: How much does the maintenance plan cost?
faqs.a: Plans start at $12/month (billed annually). Call or request a quote online for current pricing.

faqs.q: What's included in each tune-up?
faqs.a: Our 21-point inspection covers all major components. The fall visit focuses on your furnace/heat pump; the spring visit covers your AC. We also include a filter check and CO safety test.
